subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God which have been sent down in truth. Blessed is the soul that hath been drawn to their sweet-scented breezes, and verily they appear upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت بالحق طوبی لنفس استجذبت من نفحاتها و انها مره تظهر علی
